query: MongoDB Atlas cost 10TB storage analytics pricing 2024
answer: MongoDB Atlas costs vary; for 10TB storage, expect around $66.82/month. Pricing depends on cluster size and usage. Exact costs depend on specific configuration and usage patterns.

results.title: Atlas Charts Pricing - MongoDB Docs
results.snippet: Understand how Atlas Charts pricing is based on data transfer volume, with a free tier and additional charges for exceeding 1 GB per month.

results.title: MongoDB Pricing
results.snippet: Choosing the right MongoDB Atlas cluster tier for your application involves considering the application's workload, data size, and performance needs. For Dedicated clusters, use Atlas Online Archive to tier infrequently accessed data, which will reduce primary storage costs.
